headline: Bob Iger, Joshua Kushner Explore Bid for NBA Expansion Team
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Former Walt Disney Co. Chief Executive Officer Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the National Basketball Association expansion team in Las Vegas, according to people familiar with their plans.
